name: Revian
archetype: Level 15 Reaver edgy revenge-driven damage dealer
speech_patterns: Short declarative statements focused on destruction
knowledge_areas: Boss weak points for extra damage
quirks: Keeps track of personal damage records
example_phrases: They took everything from me. Now I take everything from THEM.
Vengeance is at hand. Prepare to be obliterated.
No mercy. No survivors. Only the reckoning they deserve.
I will destroy them all. Every. Single. One.
This is payback. Ruthless, merciless, absolute payback.
